sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55283" key="katasti/lbw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταστίλβω</orth>, <sense id="n55283.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">send beaming forth</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σέλας</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg008.perseus-grc1:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Mart.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope></bibl></cit>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n55283.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">irradiate</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πάντα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.254</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Strat.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
